messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] Download stats are currently unavailable
messages.body_plain:
Hi Lori,

The download stats are very valuable, and needed by Bioconductor developers for many types of grant applications, so I hope a resolution can be found. Any idea of likely timeframe?

Regards
Gordon

--------------------------------------------
Professor Gordon K Smyth
School of Mathematics & Statistics, Uni of Melbourne
Lab Head, Technological Sciences Division, WEHI
htttps://gksmyth.github.io

> [Bioc-devel] Download stats are currently unavailable
> Kern, Lori Lor|@Shepherd @end|ng |rom Ro at we||P at rk@org
> Wed Jun 17 20:59:46 CEST 2026

> The download stats are currently unavailable until further notice.  We are investigating a resolution
> We appreciate your patience.

> Lori Kern
> Bioconductor Core Team
> Roswell Park Comprehensive Cancer Center
> Department of Biostatistics & Bioinformatics
> Elm & Carlton Streets
> Buffalo, New York 14263

messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] Download stats are currently unavailable

We plan on testing a fix tomorrow or Tuesday. We delayed testing/deployment with the US holiday weekend.

messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] bioconductor docker image update to R 4.6.1?
messages.subject_clean: [Bioc-devel] bioconductor docker image update to R 4.6.1?
messages.body_plain:
Hi,

When is the bioconductor docker image expected to be updated with R 4.6.1?
I'm getting a build error for SeqVarTools in both release and devel that
may be related to the 4.6.0 -> 4.6.1 transition, but I can't reproduce it
since bioconductor/bioconductor_docker:devel is still on 4.6.0.

thanks,
Stephanie

-- 

Stephanie M. Gogarten, PhD

Senior Research Scientist / Genetic Analysis Center
<https://www.biostat.washington.edu/research/centers/gac>

Department of Biostatistics <https://www.biostat.washington.edu/>

UNIVERSITY OF WASHINGTON



UW Tower Box 359461

4333 Brooklyn Ave NE, Seattle, WA 98195

206.221.0757

sdmorris at uw.edu

she/her/hers

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]

messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] bioconductor docker image update to R 4.6.1?
messages.subject_clean: [Bioc-devel] bioconductor docker image update to R 4.6.1?
messages.body_plain:
Hi Stephanie,

Thanks for making us aware of this.

I've kicked off builds for the devel image and I'm currently working on 
the release one.

They should be done within a day or so.

Best regards,

Marcel

messages.subject: [Bioc-devel] excluderanges data update
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

We are looking to update our data package
https://bioconductor.org/packages/excluderanges/. This package has 82
objects, available via AnnotationHub. All objects have been updated. The
metadata is unchanged.

The updated objects would be better available in the next release of
Bioconductor. The old objects can remain unchanged for reproducibility, but
from the new release it's better to use the new objects. Ideally, using the
same AnnotationHub IDs, but if new need to be created, that is OK.

Thanks,
Mikhail

	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
